{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Jai Chen's spirit
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen's spirit]] has shattered channels and cracked [[madra]] paths that make cycling difficult.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] battles [[Jai Chen]]’s spirit, [[Fingerling]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
